# Changing motion quickly

## Short Teaching Summary
Changing motion quickly: Momentum is most useful when determining whether an object’s motion is difficult or easy to change over a short time interval. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
